chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: Hello guys, my name is Nitish and you are welcome to my YouTube channel.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: So, we will continue our deep learning course in this video.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: Till now we have studied about Perceptron.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: First we saw what is Perceptron, then we saw how to train it.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: First we saw Perceptron trick, then we saw loss functions.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: So, at this point we have a clarity that what is Perceptron and how does it work.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: But Perceptron could not become that famous for deep learning.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: There was a reason for that.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: The reason was that Perceptron can only work on linear data.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: It cannot work on non-linear data.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: So, in today's video, I will show you some codes and some examples

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: practically that Perceptron could not work on non-linear data.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: So, this is a small video.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: I didn't want to add it to any other video because I thought it should be treated as an independent topic.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: That is why this 10-minute video.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: But in this video, you will learn that,

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: I will show you that if you give non-linear data, no matter how small or big it is,

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: no matter how much time you give Perceptron to train on that data,

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: Perceptron will never be able to converge because essentially Perceptron is a linear model.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: So, this is what we have to see in this video.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: So, now let's start the video.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: So, guys, what is the problem in Perceptron?

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: To show this, I have written a code.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: And this code is on your screen.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: So, what I have done is that I have created three different data sets.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: One of them is OR data, one is AND data, and one is XOR data.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: I will run the Perceptron algorithm on all three data sets.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: And I will plot a graph and show you what the output is.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: So, let's run the code.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: Here we have imported some libraries.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: In this cell, we have made three new Pandas data frames.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: And after that, I have basically created a data set here.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: Here I have created my OR data.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: Here I have created my AND data.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: And here I have created my XOR data.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: So, I will quickly run all these cells and show you the output.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: So, you can see this is my AND data.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: In AND, you know that when both are 1, then the output is 1.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: In all other cases, the output is 0.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: There are 4 rows in all three data sets.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: If you plot this, then this is your AND data.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: In OR data, if any one is 1, then the output will be 1.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: If both are 0, then the output will be 0.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: I have plotted this too.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: This is our OR data set.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: And after that, there is XOR.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: When both are the same, then the output is 0.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: And when both are different, then the output is 1.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: Here is its output.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: This is the graph.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: Now what I did is I called the Perceptron class from Scikit-learn.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: And created three different objects.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: Classifier 1, Classifier 2, Classifier 3.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: All three are Perceptron.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: And after that, here are my outputs.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: Coefficients of Classifier 1 and Intercept of Classifier 1.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: And when I plotted it,

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: So you can see that my Perceptron ran on AND data.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: And it easily divided both the classes.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: Similarly, when I ran Classifier 2 on OR data.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: So again you can see that a Perceptron, a line.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: Classified the data set in both the classes.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: But when I ran Classifier 3 on our XOR data.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: I did not get any clear cut boundary.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: And this is the problem of Perceptron.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: I have told you many times.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: That it can work only on linear relationships.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: But I wanted to show you practically.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: If there is a non-linear relationship.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: Then it will not be captured.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: Because if you look at XOR data.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: You can't draw a single line.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: Can't separate the two classes.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: Now I have another very good tool.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: So here I will show you running Perceptron.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: So I will select first of all this data set.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: This data set is linearly separable.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: Here you make your neural network.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: So here right now it is a proper neural network.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: But I don't need a neural network.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: I just need a Perceptron.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: So I am removing these hidden layers.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
chunks.text: This is the Perceptron.

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron

chunks.title: Problem with Perceptron
